message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="red" summary="Consensus confirmed, dependencies verified">
Marty, this is consensus from me. No blocking concerns.

One tiny correction on your dependencies: you said "#8 and #9 should be blocked by #7, not just #7 blocked by #7" and then corrected yourself. Just to be clear on my understanding of your final numbering:

- #7 (view+add) blocked by #6 (login/logout)
- #8 (complete) blocked by #7
- #9 (delete) blocked by #7
- #10 (edit) blocked by #7
- #8, #9, #10 independent of each other

That's right. You need items in the list to complete, delete, or edit them, but those three operations don't depend on each other. Good.

Ship it. Let's tell the coordinator.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Steve Krug confirming consensus and verifying my dependencies are correct. The task list already reflects this (with edit as Task #20 instead of #10, but same structure). Nothing to do here -- we're aligned and the coordinator has already been notified.

The product side is in good shape. All user stories written, reviewed, and approved. All open questions resolved. Task breakdown finalized by team consensus. I'm standing by to lead discovery sessions as the mob reaches each feature.
